label: Algorithms & data structures

node.label: Algorithms & data structures
node.definition: Search, sorting, indexing, dynamic programming, graphs, and data organization determine computational behavior and efficiency.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Algorithms & data structures is to connect Discrete mathematics & logic to downstream capabilities including Complexity & computability, Programming languages, compilers & type systems, Databases & information retrieval.
examples: substrate for Programming languages, compilers & type systems
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic.

dependencies.rationale: Algorithms & data structures rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.

sentence_units.text: Search, sorting, indexing, dynamic programming, graphs, and data organization determine computational behavior and efficiency.
